title: Bingosupermarket Raffle Tickets 1-500 Cloakroom - Assorted Colours bordered (Orange)
features: Each Ticket is perforated for easy splitting to tear off and distribute. Many organsiations use these for Events, Entry, Class Reward, Fundraiser, Prizes and tombola draw, charity events and indoor gaming

A unique serial number is added to each book that is also printed on every ticket. The unique different code is printed on each ticket clearly to keep integrity of the use. It stops participants and users from buying their own book to rig the use.

Bingosupermarket has created this exclusive range of cloakroom and raffle tickets in a variety of colors. The colored border is used do differentiate uses and run multiple coded uses at the same time.

There are 10 cloakroom tickets on a single page with 5 tickets divided equally in two halves with the same number for duplication. Quality of paper is smooth with deliberate perforations that do not fall apart but can also be easily split without tearing the rest of the tickets.
description: Bingosupermarket Raffle Tickets 1-500 Cloakroom Tickets - Assorted Colours bordered. These tickets are available in a range of colours Green, Blue, Pink, Orange and Red. The front cover is glossy and thick to protect the contents of the tickets. Inside the tickets are in pages with 5 numbers that are duplicated and perforated. The perforations surround the tickets so you have the option of splitting the tickets completely from the book or just spliting 1 or 2 at a time. The clear colour coded border around the ticket gives a range of uses for themes and grouping as well as running muliple uses at the same time with more than one book. It is important to note that each book that we supply has its own unique serial number that is also printed on each and every ticket. This ensures that each and every ticket that is distributed is unique.
